name: whatsapp-command-channel
description: Turn your own WhatsApp into a private command-and-notification channel for your automations.

scripts.test: node --check wa-daemon.cjs && node --check wa-watch.cjs && node --check wa-watchdog.cjs && node --check wa-reply.cjs && echo ok
scripts.check: for f in *.cjs; do node --check "$f"; done && echo ok
